task_completion.description: Open the broken IAT experiment file in PsychoPy.
task_completion.visual_evidence: PsychoPy Builder interface is visible with 'iat_broken.psyexp' loaded in the window title or tab.

task_completion.description: Correct the order of Block 3 and Block 4 in the experiment flow.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Flow panel at the bottom of the PsychoPy window shows the blocks being rearranged, swapping the positions of the 3rd and 4th blocks.

task_completion.description: Fix the practice block loop so it runs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A loop properties dialog is open for the practice block, showing the 'nReps' field being changed from 0 to a valid number (e.g., 1).

task_completion.description: Fix the syntax error in the response mapping code component.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Code Component properties window is open, showing Python code where an assignment operator '=' is corrected to an equality check '==' inside an if-statement.

task_completion.description: Fix the incorrect color variable reference in the text component.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Text Component properties window is open, showing the Color field being updated from '$category_color' to '$stim_color'.

task_completion.description: Fix the missing '$' prefix for the participant variable in the data filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Experiment Settings dialog is open, and the Data filename field is edited to include a '$' before the 'participant' variable.

task_completion.description: Add a debriefing routine to the end of the experiment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new routine named 'debrief' is created and inserted at the very end of the timeline in the Flow panel.

task_completion.description: Save the corrected experiment to the specified output file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Save As' dialog is used to save the file as 'iat_fixed.psyexp' in the /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/ directory, or the PsychoPy window title updates to 'iat_fixed.psyexp'.

integrity.description: The agent used the PsychoPy Builder GUI to make the changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with PsychoPy dialog boxes, properties panels, and the Flow UI, rather than a text editor modifying the raw .psyexp XML file.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely created a new debrief routine.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen using the 'Insert Routine' feature in PsychoPy to add the debrief screen, rather than just renaming an existing routine.

integrity.description: The agent saved the file properly through the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent uses PsychoPy's File > Save As menu or shortcut, rather than terminal commands to copy or rename the file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The broken file is at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/iat_broken.psyexp. The agent must fix exactly 5 bugs: 1) Swap Block 3 and Block 4 in the Flow. 2) Change practice block loop 'nReps' from 0 to a valid number (>0). 3) Fix a syntax error in a code component by changing '=' to '==' in an if-statement. 4) Change a text component color reference from '$category_color' to '$stim_color'. 5) Prefix the 'participant' variable with '$' in the Data filename in Experiment Settings. Additionally, the agent must add a 'debrief' routine at the end of the flow and save the fixed file as /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/iat_fixed.psyexp.
